title: デビュー戦の後に・最大の魅力

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That was so much fun! I had a great time!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: How was my runnin'? Was it fun to watch?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow, ya sure sound happy! Just hearin' that
makes me happy too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's enjoy our next race too!

Taiki Shuttle's debut race comes to an end. The
following day...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's nice to see you again!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I attended Taiki Shuttle's debut race, and she was
fantastic! She's certainly improved her skills.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that the debut race is over, the real
competition awaits...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Have you decided on your next steps?

Every Umamusume has races that align more with
their skills.

I've felt for some time that Taiki Shuttle's speed is
her strong suit.

After watching her debut race, I'm convinced
she'd do well in sprint and mile races.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, is there something bothering you, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Taiki's goal is to become Umamusume of the
Year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'd recommend the Big Eight. Those
races attract a lot of attention, making it easier
to gain favorable reviews.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
To be more specific, you could aim for the
Classics or the Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list: (All of those races are far too long for Taiki...)

text_block_list.text:
I can't expect her to place well in races that don't
suit her aptitude...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I get the feeling you're really thinking this over.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
When you can't make up your mind, try walking it
back to the starting line!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Why not go and see what your trainee is up to?

Following Tazuna's advice, I go looking for Taiki
Shuttle.

I find her on the academy grounds practicing hard
by herself.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Nothin' feels better than blazing down the
track!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Are you all set? I'd like to begin.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am. Ready... go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it ain't Suzuka and Air Groove! Are they
runnin' together?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! If you two are partner runnin', I wanna
join!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?!

Air Groove and Silence Suzuka are ahead by a
few hundred meters.

Yet Taiki Shuttle closes in on them, coming in at
tremendous speed.

Her powerful legs propel her through the air,
sending clumps of grass spattering against her
face...
I realize what we have to do.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer! What'd ya wanna talk about?
choice_data_list: I want to discuss our race goals.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good thinkin'! A debut is just the beginning,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So what's our next race gonna be?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Remember, I'm gunnin' to be the next
Umamusume of the Year, and I ain't stopping till I
do!

Taiki's determination is unyielding. I know what
needs to be said...
choice_data_list: Let's master sprint and mile races!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sprints and miles? Those're the ones around
1,600 meters, right?

Following this path will undoubtedly complicate
her goal of becoming Umamusume of the Year. It
won't be easy.

But even if the odds aren't stacked in her favor...
with legs like hers, she may just come out on top!
choice_data_list: We'll show off your power and speed!
We'll show off your power and speed!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Power and speed?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: My top traits...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeeehaw! I'm pickin' up what you're puttin' down!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I gotta say I'm all for it! Let's go smash those
sprints and miles!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So what's up first?!

We now have a path to follow. Our next stop is a
mile race held in Kyoto during winter...
choice_data_list: Let's take on the Shinzan Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! We're gonna train for the Shinzan Kinen
till the cows come home!
